_doc: Launch original sectional — Coding-Decoding. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: In a code, each letter is shifted 1 places forward. How is TRAIN coded?
questions.stem_hi: एक code में हर letter 1 places आगे shift होता है। TRAIN को कैसे code करेंगे?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Shifted 1 places backward instead of forward.
options.trap_reason_hi: 1 places forward की जगह backward shift किया।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reversed the word but did not apply the letter shift.
options.trap_reason_hi: Word reverse किया पर letter shift apply नहीं किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Applied the shift but also reversed the result, which the rule never says.
options.trap_reason_hi: Shift apply करके result reverse भी कर दिया, जबकि rule में reverse नहीं है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Move every letter of TRAIN forward by 1: TRAIN becomes USBJO. Therefore, answer = USBJO.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Letter-shift coding uses alphabet positions. Apply the same displacement to each character and wrap after Z if needed. Final answer is USBJO.
questions.explanation_method_hi: TRAIN के हर letter को 1 आगे करें: TRAIN का code USBJO होगा। अतः answer = USBJO।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Letter-shift coding में alphabet positions use होते हैं। हर character पर same displacement लगाएँ। Final answer USBJO है।

questions.stem_en: If words are coded by reversing their letters, how is RAIL coded?
questions.stem_hi: यदि words को letters reverse करके code किया जाता है, तो RAIL का code क्या होगा?

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Left the word unchanged and missed the reverse rule.
options.trap_reason_hi: Word unchanged छोड़ दिया और reverse rule miss कर दिया।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Shifted letters by +1 instead of reversing their order.
options.trap_reason_hi: Order reverse करने की जगह letters +1 shift कर दिए।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Reversed first but then rotated one letter, which is not part of the rule.
options.trap_reason_hi: पहले reverse किया फिर one-letter rotation कर दिया, rule में rotation नहीं है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Reverse the order of letters in RAIL: LIAR. Therefore, answer = LIAR.
questions.explanation_concept_en: In reverse coding, letter identities stay unchanged; only their positions are mirrored from end to start. Final answer is LIAR.
questions.explanation_method_hi: RAIL के letters का order reverse करें: LIAR। अतः answer = LIAR।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Reverse coding में letters वही रहते हैं; सिर्फ positions end से start तक mirror होती हैं। Final answer LIAR है।
